# Add summaries to a layer

Registers one or more summary rows that update with filtering. When
multiple layers share the same `bind`, a single summaries card can be
created.

## Usage

``` r
add_summaries(
  map,
  ...,
  id = NULL,
  bind = NULL,
  position = NULL,
  layer_id = NULL
)
```

## Arguments

- map:

  A maplamina widget created by
  [`maplamina()`](https://jhumbl.github.io/maplamina/reference/maplamina.md).

- ...:

  One or more `summary_*()` objects (or a single list of them).

- id:

  Optional id used as a shorthand bind id when `bind` is omitted.

- bind:

  Bind group id for shared UI control.

- position:

  Optional UI position hint (applied to the control group).

- layer_id:

  Target layer id (defaults to the most recently added layer).

## Value

The modified map widget.

## Examples

``` r
d <- data.frame(
  lon   = runif(1000, -60, 60),
  lat   = runif(1000, -60, 60),
  value = runif(1000, 1, 10)
)
maplamina() |>
  add_circles(d) |>
  add_filters(filter_range(~value), bind = "filters") |>
  add_summaries(summary_mean(~value, label = "Avg value"), bind = "summaries") |>
  add_panel(sections = sections(section("filters"), section("summaries")))

{"x":{"map_options":{"style":"https://basemaps.cartocdn.com/gl/positron-gl-style/style.json","projection":"mercator","dragRotate":false,"fit_bounds":true,"controls":[{"type":"navigation","position":"topright","options":{"showZoom":true,"showCompass":false}}]},".__layers":{"circle1":{"id":"circle1","type":"circle","group":null,"data_columns":{"position":{"values":{"ref":"position"},"size":2}},"base_encodings":{"radius":{"value":6},"lineWidth":{"value":1},"fillColor":{"value":[30,144,255,204]},"lineColor":{"value":[0,0,139,255]}},"cfg":{"pickable":true,"stroke":true,"radiusUnits":"pixels","lineWidthUnits":"pixels"},"bbox":[-59.90738564170897,-59.66721922159195,59.6819288469851,59.9667629878968],"coordinate_origin":null,"dataStore":{"blobs":{"blob_fa0e65a6d0a18a90":{"dtype":"f32","href":{"data":"data:application/octet-stream;base64,"},"length":1000},"blob_af402d3572c3cc85":{"dtype":"f32","href":{"data":"data:application/octet-stream;base64,"},"length":2000}},"refs":{"sm.sum_1.values":"blob_fa0e65a6d0a18a90","position":"blob_af402d3572c3cc85","flt.rng_1.values":"blob_fa0e65a6d0a18a90"}}}},".__components":{"views":[],"range":{"rng_1":{"type":"range","id":"rng_1","layer":"circle1","bind":"filters","position":null,"label":"value","default":null,"min":1.022687928052619,"max":9.998367957537994,"step":null,"live":true,"values":{"ref":"flt.rng_1.values"},"values_ref_hint":"flt.rng_1.values"}},"select":[],"legends":[],"summaries":{"sum_1":{"type":"summaries","id":"sum_1","layer":"circle1","bind":"summaries","position":null,"label":"Avg value","op":"mean","na_rm":true,"values":{"ref":"sm.sum_1.values"},"values_ref_hint":"sm.sum_1.values"}}},".__controls":{"filters":{"type":"filters","controls":{"value":{"type":"range","label":"value","members":["rng_1"],"domain":{"min":1.022687928052619,"max":9.998367957537994},"live":true}},"order":["value"]},"summaries":{"type":"summaries","rows":{"Avg value":{"op":"mean","label":"Avg value","members":["sum_1"],"na_rm":true}},"order":["Avg value"]}},".__panel":{"title":null,"description":null,"icon":null,"dividers":true,"position":null,"sections":[{"id":"filters"},{"id":"summaries"}]}},"evals":[],"jsHooks":[]}
```
